ddegp_utils
===========

.. py:module:: ddegp_utils


Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   ddegp_utils.differences_by_dim_func
   ddegp_utils.rbf_kernel


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: differences_by_dim_func(X1, X2, rays, n_order, index=-1)

   
   Compute dimension-wise pairwise differences between X1 and X2,
   including hypercomplex perturbations in the directions specified by `rays`.

   :param X1: First input array.
   :type X1: ndarray of shape (n1, d)
   :param X2: Second input array.
   :type X2: ndarray of shape (n2, d)
   :param rays: Direction vectors applied for each dimension using hypercomplex algebra.
   :type rays: ndarray of shape (d, n_rays)
   :param n_order: Derivative order used to define the hypercomplex perturbation.
   :type n_order: int
   :param index: Index to determine which points receive tagging. Default is -1 (all tagged).
   :type index: list or int, optional

   :returns: **differences_by_dim** -- List of length d. Each entry is an (n1, n2) array of directional differences for one dimension.
   :rtype: list of ndarray















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!

.. py:function:: rbf_kernel(differences, length_scales, n_order, kernel_func, der_indices, powers, index=-1)

   
   Compute a radial basis function (RBF) kernel matrix with hypercomplex derivative augmentation.

   :param differences: List of difference arrays for each input dimension.
   :type differences: list of ndarray
   :param length_scales: Log-scaled length scale parameters.
   :type length_scales: ndarray
   :param n_order: Maximum derivative order.
   :type n_order: int
   :param kernel_func: Kernel function to be used for evaluating pairwise differences.
   :type kernel_func: callable
   :param der_indices: Multi-index derivatives specifying derivative evaluation directions.
   :type der_indices: list of lists
   :param powers: Parity powers used to scale contributions.
   :type powers: list of int
   :param index: Index for submodel selection or evaluation region.
   :type index: list or int, optional

   :returns: **K** -- Full kernel matrix with function values and derivative blocks.
   :rtype: ndarray















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!
